name: asset-factory-root
description: Root orchestration for the URAI Asset Factory monorepo

scripts.lint: npm run check:runtime && npm run check:docs
scripts.test: npm --prefix engine test && npm --prefix life-map-pipeline/functions test && npm --prefix functions test && npm run check:runtime && npm run check:docs
scripts.build: npm --prefix life-map-pipeline/functions run build && npm --prefix functions run build
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
